specializations: Specialty fermentation actives for skin and hair
product_highlights: TEGO® Sterol — bio-fermented phytosterol for barrier repair
Specialty fermentation actives for anti-aging and skin renewal
Recombinant protein ingredients for advanced cosmetic performance
Sustainable biotechnology portfolio reducing environmental footprint

notes: Evonik's personal care division has made significant investments in biotechnology-derived ingredients. Their biotech portfolio includes bio-fermented sterols, recombinant proteins, and sustainable alternatives to petrochemical-derived ingredients. Evonik's fermentation capabilities enable the production of high-purity actives with consistent quality and a significantly reduced environmental footprint compared to traditional chemical synthesis.
